prompt: Across the 'What will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit in May 2026?' strike ladder, compare the YES probability and 24h trading volume for the $90, $100, $110, $120, $130, $140, and $150 HIGH strikes — chart the implied probability curve so I can see exactly where the market expects WTI to settle this month and where the volume actually is.
expectedReason: homepage showcase categorical charts need multi-row comparisons
